subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Though I have not written unto thee, yet the cherished countenances of the friends are ever present in my remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان هر چند بشما نامه ننگاشتم ولی دائما روی دلجوی دوستانرا بخاطر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
